name: @livepeer-rewrite/vtuber-gateway-portal
description: Vtuber-specific portal SPA. Composes customer-portal/frontend/shared widgets + vtuber-specific pages (session list, persona authoring, scene history) per plan 0013-vtuber OQ3 lock.

scripts.build: tsc -p tsconfig.json && mkdir -p dist/components && cp src/components/*.css dist/components/
scripts.test: tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && mkdir -p dist-test/src/components && cp src/components/*.css dist-test/src/components/ && node --test ./dist-test/test/**/*.test.js
